violations.text: The door to the outside, located at the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2025
Inspector observed an accumulation of dead spiders and webs in the back storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025
Inspector observed single use items (paper shopping bags) stored in the restroom. PIC removed items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -retail cooler vents, -retail shelves, -2 door cooler and freezer in back storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

The floors in the back storage area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. V&D poster emailed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
The light shield in the bake foods aisle is in poor repair(light out). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
